decks.notes: This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with an aggressive creature strategy. Cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls provide early pressure, while powerful finishers like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury can help close out games. Utilizing cards like Goblin Bombardment for additional reach and removal, along with Ajani, Nacatl Pariah for protection and value generation, this deck aims to take control of the board early and maintain its advantage until the opponent is defeated. The deck also includes some disruptive elements like Blood Moon and Seasoned Pyromancer to disrupt opponents' strategies.

The main concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. The deck focuses on utilizing cards like Ocelot Pride, Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to apply early pressure and finish off the opponent with cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls provide additional support for the aggressive strategy. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Arena of Glory and Seasoned Pyromancer to control the board and maintain pressure.

The key concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly establish board presence and apply pressure on the opponent. Utilizing efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, backed up with removal spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive game plan. Cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Seasoned Pyromancer provide additional value and support to maintain the pressure. Additionally, disruption in the form of Blood Moon and Thraben Charm can disrupt the opponent's game plan and give the deck an edge in the matchup.

This deck focuses on quickly generating mana and casting spells to chain together a powerful combo using Ral, Monsoon Mage's ability to deal damage and draw cards. The deck includes cards like Manamorphose and Desperate Ritual to generate mana, while spells like Glimpse the Impossible and Reckless Impulse are used to find key combo pieces. Past in Flames allows for spells to be recast from the graveyard, and Pyretic Ritual helps accelerate the combo. The end goal is to eventually cast a lethal Grapeshot using the mana generated from the combo pieces.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the Amulet of Vigor to generate multiple mana loops and quickly ramp into playing Primeval Titan to search for utility lands like Boseiju, Who Endures and win conditions like Scapeshift. The deck aims to assemble the Amulet Titan combo efficiently through land ramp spells like Arboreal Grazer and Lotus Field, while also using cards like Aftermath Analyst and Malevolent Rumble to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck aims to establish a dominating board presence and quickly close out the game with powerful land combos.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, backed up by burn spells such as Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm to pressure the opponent and control the board. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury provide additional threats and utility. The deck also includes disruption with Mana Tithe and Surgical Extraction, while Arena of Glory and Elegant Parlor help to maintain card advantage and board presence. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient aggressive strategy.

The main focus of this deck is to use the combo of Basking Broodscale and Blade of the Bloodchief to generate a powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes various cards to support this combo, such as Glaring Fleshraker and Malevolent Rumble. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Soul-Guide Lantern and Kozilek's Command helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to control the game through efficient removal and disruption while building up a strong presence on the battlefield to secure victory.

The deck is centered around utilizing fast mana acceleration and card draw to set up explosive combos, focusing on generating red mana with cards like Ruby Medallion and Desperate Ritual. The goal is to cast Past in Flames to reuse key spells from the graveyard and chain together multiple spells to finish off the opponent with a large Grapeshot or Ral, Monsoon Mage ultimate ability. The deck also includes some flexibility with Wish granting access to additional cards from the sideboard to support the combo.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and aggressively control the game, utilizing efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler to deal damage to the opponent. The deck includes a mix of burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to remove threats and finish off the opponent. Additionally, cards like Mishra's Bauble and Preordain help with card selection and ensuring a consistent flow of threats. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of creature and burn spells while maintaining a fast pace of play.

This deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo using Malevolent Rumble, Emry, Lurker of the Loch, Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student, and Grinding Station. By utilizing artifacts like Mox Amber, Mox Opal, and Mishra's Bauble to generate mana quickly and recur key pieces from the graveyard, the deck aims to achieve a game-winning board state. It includes cards like Unholy Heat and Metallic Rebuke for disruption and protection, while Urza's Saga and Sewer-veillance Cam provide additional value and card advantage. The deck's strategy revolves around creating a lethal combo engine to outpace and overwhelm opponents in a Modern 1 vs 1 format.

This UW Control deck aims to disrupt opponents' strategies by utilizing a variety of counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage engines. It focuses on controlling the game through countering threats, removing key permanents, and drawing cards to outvalue the opponent. The deck also includes powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Teferi, Time Raveler to generate card advantage and provide additional disruption. With a focus on efficient answers and a reliable mana base, this deck aims to outlast opponents and win through attrition.

The deck focuses on assembling the powerful combo of Amulet of Vigor, Primeval Titan, and various land cards to generate massive amounts of mana and quickly search for key pieces such as Urza's Saga. Utilizing cards like Scapeshift and Explore to ramp up mana production, while also providing tools for card draw and searching for essential pieces like Primeval Titan. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with fast mana generation and explosive plays, leveraging the synergy between land cards and creatures to quickly establish dominance on the battlefield.

The deck focuses on aggressive creatures that can be blinked for extra value, combining the strategy of aggro with the ability to protect and reuse key creatures using blink spells like Ephemerate. Utilizing a mix of removal spells like Fatal Push and disruption like Thoughtseize, the deck aims to outpace opponents and overwhelm them with its efficient creatures and disruptive capabilities. By blinking powerful creatures like Overlord of the Balemurk and Witch Enchanter, the deck can generate incremental advantages and maintain pressure on the opponent.

The main focus of this Dimir Control deck is to disrupt your opponent's game plan while gaining card advantage and controlling the board through counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. The deck aims to establish control over the game by using cards like Counterspell, Fatal Push, and Sheoldred's Edict to control the battlefield, while also utilizing cards like Consult the Star Charts and Subtlety to draw cards and dig for key pieces of the deck. The deck also includes a mix of creatures and planeswalkers to provide additional threats and win conditions.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays and burn spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. With powerful creatures like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, combined with burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent from the start. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides additional support and buffing abilities, while cards like Thraben Charm and Voice of Victory offer versatility and removal options. The deck aims to win fast and efficiently with a mix of creature damage and direct burn spells.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing the powerful UrzaTron lands to ramp up mana quickly. The deck includes a mix of powerful Eldrazi creatures, such as Thought-Knot Seer and Ulamog, the Ceaseless Hunger, alongside disruptive spells like Dismember and Kozilek's Command. Karn, the Great Creator is used to shut down opposing artifacts, while Ugin, the Eye of the Storms provides additional board control. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with large threats and disruption while maintaining a strong mana base through the UrzaTron lands.
